name: Cars
synposis: Set in a world populated entirely by anthropomorphic vehicles, the film follows a young self-obsessed racecar named Lightning McQueen who, on the way to the most important race of his life, becomes stranded in a forgotten town along U.S. Route 66 called Radiator Springs, where he learns about friendship and begins to reevaluate his priorities.

name: Cars 2
synopsis: race car Lightning McQueen and his tow-truck friend Mater travel the world for a racing tournament, but Mater accidentally gets caught up in an international spy mission.

name: Cars 3
synopsis: veteran racer Lightning McQueen struggles to compete with a new generation of high-tech racers and trains with young technician Cruz Ramirez to prove he still belongs on the track
